title: Qwen3-ASR MLX segmented-cache App smoke
created_from: Follow-up FUP-001 from segmented-cache service prototype

follow_ups.title: App-managed segmented ASR service supervision
follow_ups.reason: This feature keeps service startup manual through a smoke script. Product use needs startup, health checks, timeout/fallback behavior, crash handling, and cleanup policy owned by the App or a supported local supervisor.

follow_ups.title: Record real macOS segmented App smoke results
follow_ups.reason: Automated checks validate the smoke runner and Swift HTTP client compatibility, but paste safety, focus behavior, permissions, and floating-panel UX require manual UI validation on the user's Mac.
